summary: Tested 2 new features: (1) Referee AI Assistant - ALL TESTS PASS, (2) Tournament Bracket Editor - CRITICAL BUG: BracketEditor component not rendering

ui_bugs.issue: BracketEditor component does not render at all in the Brackets tab. The IIFE in Manager/index.tsx (lines 152-156) returns null and never re-renders when tournaments data loads.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test bracket creation because BracketEditor component doesn't render. The tournament selector shows tournaments correctly, but the BracketEditor below it is not rendered.

referee_ai_assistant.referee_ai_fab: PASS - [data-testid='referee-ai-fab'] visible on referee dashboard only
referee_ai_assistant.ai_response: PASS - Gemini 2.5 Pro responds to messages correctly
referee_ai_assistant.fab_not_on_manager: PASS - Referee AI FAB does NOT appear on manager dashboard (correct behavior)

bracket_editor.bracket_format_select: CANNOT TEST - dialog doesn't open because create button not rendered
bracket_editor.bracket_teams_input: CANNOT TEST - dialog doesn't open because create button not rendered

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix BracketEditor not rendering in Manager/index.tsx. The IIFE at lines 152-156 returns null and doesn't re-render when tournaments load. Replace IIFE with proper conditional rendering or useMemo with tournaments dependency.

Suggested fix: Change the IIFE to a direct conditional render: {(selectedBracketTournament || tournaments[0]?.id) && tournaments.find(x => x.id === (selectedBracketTournament || tournaments[0]?.id)) && <BracketEditor ... />}
critical_code_review_comments: BUG: Manager/index.tsx lines 152-156 - IIFE pattern causes BracketEditor to not render. The IIFE evaluates once during initial render when tournaments array may be empty, returns null, and doesn't re-evaluate when tournaments load.
The Select component correctly shows tournaments because it uses the value prop which re-evaluates on each render, but the IIFE result is not reactive.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referee AI Assistant feature is fully working - all data-testid elements present and functional, Gemini 2.5 Pro integration working. Bracket Editor has a CRITICAL bug where the BracketEditor component doesn't render at all. The issue is in Manager/index.tsx lines 152-156 where an IIFE is used for conditional rendering. The IIFE evaluates to null on first render (when tournaments is empty) and doesn't re-evaluate when tournaments load. After fix, test: bracket-empty, bracket-create-btn, bracket-format-select, bracket-teams-input, bracket-create-confirm-btn, bracket-editor, bracket-tree.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: React rendering issue with IIFE pattern in Manager/index.tsx. The IIFE at lines 152-156 evaluates once during component render. When tournaments array is initially empty (data still loading from Firestore), the IIFE returns null. When tournaments load and component re-renders, the IIFE still returns null because React doesn't track the IIFE's internal variables as dependencies.
reproduction_steps: 3. Click Brackets tab (last tab, may need to scroll)
4. Observe: Tournament selector shows 'Spring Showcase Classic' but no BracketEditor content below it
5. Select a different tournament - still no BracketEditor renders
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Replace the IIFE with a proper conditional render that React can track: const selectedTid = selectedBracketTournament || tournaments[0]?.id; const selectedTournament = tournaments.find(x => x.id === selectedTid); Then render: {selectedTid && selectedTournament && <BracketEditor tournamentId={selectedTid} tournamentName={selectedTournament.name} />}
